overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a peaceful walk through a suburban Los Santos neighborhood during golden hour. The player moves along sidewalks past single-family homes, palm trees, and occasional pedestrians while vehicles occasionally pass on the adjacent road, with mountains visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: suburban residential sidewalk with palm trees

events.description: black sedan drives past on the road from left to right
passing a yellow fire hydrant on the grass verge

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past suburban homes with well-maintained lawns

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the road in the same direction as the camera

entered.detail: single-story suburban home with red tile roof and red sports car in driveway
tall palm trees lining the street against mountain backdrop
wooden utility pole with transformer and power lines
yellow fire hydrant on grass verge between sidewalk and road

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of a quiet suburban street during golden hour. The camera walks past a yellow stucco house with a red sports car parked in the driveway, while palm trees line the street against a mountain backdrop. A black sedan drives past on the road, and the camera continues along the concrete sidewalk past a yellow fire hydrant.

events.description: pedestrian approaches from opposite direction on sidewalk
passing blue USPS mailbox on the grass verge

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk, approaching a pedestrian walking in the opposite direction

notable_agents.action: woman in gray jacket and hat walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: blue USPS postal mailbox on the sidewalk edge
white single-story house with brick chimney and covered porch

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking along the residential sidewalk, passing a blue USPS mailbox. A woman in a gray jacket approaches from the opposite direction and passes by. A white bungalow with a brick chimney becomes visible on the right as the previous yellow house recedes behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with brick walls and mature trees

events.description: second pedestrian approaches and passes on the right side of sidewalk
brick retaining wall and wooden fence become prominent on the right

agents.ego_description: walking past a white bungalow with brick chimney, approaching another pedestrian

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress with red hair walking toward and passing the camera

entered.detail: low red brick wall with concrete cap along property line
wooden fence on top of brick wall
mature tree with dense foliage overhanging the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The camera walks past the white bungalow, which is now closer on the right, alongside a brick retaining wall and wooden privacy fence. A second pedestrian in a green dress approaches and passes. A large tree with dense foliage begins to overhang the sidewalk from the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential-commercial transition with large shade trees

events.description: walking under dense tree canopy creating shade on the sidewalk
commercial buildings with signage become visible in the distance ahead

agents.ego_description: walking under the shade of a large tree canopy toward a commercial area with storefronts visible ahead

entered.detail: low-rise commercial buildings with colorful signage visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera moves under the dense canopy of a large tree, creating shade over the sidewalk. The white bungalow and brick wall pass out of view behind, while commercial buildings with visible signage appear in the distance ahead, indicating a transition from residential to commercial zoning.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a quiet suburban neighborhood that gradually transitions from residential homes toward a commercial district. It begins on a sun-drenched sidewalk during golden hour, passing a yellow stucco house and a red sports car while a black sedan drives by against a backdrop of distant mountains. As the camera moves forward past a blue USPS mailbox, a woman in a gray jacket passes by and the scenery shifts toward a white bungalow with a brick chimney. The path then continues alongside a brick retaining wall and wooden fence, where a second pedestrian in a green dress appears before a large, leafy tree begins to overhang the walkway. Finally, the camera moves under the dense shade of the canopy, leaving the residential houses behind as commercial buildings and signage emerge in the distance.
